A travel governance platform built around your existing ecosystem

Cinturon360 is being built to help TMCs and their clients control approvals, policy, compliance, reporting, and operational visibility across modern travel programs.

What Cinturon360 Does

Cinturon360 is developed by RePass Cloud as a travel governance, control, and visibility platform. It is designed to work across the booking channels, suppliers, workflows, and systems organisations already use, helping TMCs and their clients apply approvals, policy, reporting, and financial oversight without forcing a full rip-and-replace approach.

Who Cinturon360 Is For

🏢

TMCs

Built for travel management companies that need a stronger platform for client onboarding, policy control, approvals, integrations, reporting, and operational oversight.

💼

Corporate Travel Programs

Designed for organisations that want clearer control over travel approvals, spend visibility, compliance, and reporting across existing booking channels.

🏛️

Government & Controlled Environments

Suitable for travel environments that require stronger governance, structured approvals, auditability, and more defensible operational visibility.

✈️

Leisure & High-Net-Worth

Governance and visibility tools for premium leisure programs — structured oversight for advisors managing high-net-worth clients who expect precision, discretion, and quality.

Product Principles

🔄

No Rip-and-Replace

Cinturon360 is designed to work around existing travel channels, suppliers, and managed travel workflows rather than forcing a full platform replacement.

⚖️

Practical Governance

The platform focuses on approvals, policy enforcement, cost allocation, exception handling, integrations, and reporting that real travel programs need every day.

👁️

Clear Visibility

Cinturon360 is built to give travel, finance, operations, procurement, and leadership teams a clearer view of spend, compliance, and booking activity.

Why Cinturon360 Exists

Cinturon360 is being developed to solve a common problem in managed travel: important travel decisions are often spread across disconnected booking tools, supplier channels, approval workflows, reporting processes, and manual workarounds.

For TMCs, that creates unnecessary operational complexity across client onboarding, account servicing, policy management, reporting, and integration handling.

For client organisations, it can mean limited visibility, inconsistent approvals, weak reporting, poor exception management, and too much dependence on fragmented processes.

Cinturon360 is being built to become the operating layer above that complexity, giving TMCs and their clients a more connected way to manage travel governance, operational control, and financial visibility.

Built by RePass Cloud

Danijel-James Wynyard

Founder and Product Lead

Cinturon360 is being led by Danijel-James Wynyard through RePass Cloud, with a focus on building a more capable platform for TMCs and the organisations they serve.

The product direction is centred on approvals, policy, integrations, reporting, client management, and operational control across the modern travel ecosystem.

Cinturon360 is coming soon

Cinturon360 is an upcoming travel governance and visibility platform designed to work with existing booking channels, apply policy and approvals, and deliver finance-grade reporting. Join the waitlist to follow the launch.
